title: Luxury Oceanfront Penthouse with Miami Beach Skyline Views
description: Stunning penthouse with direct oceanfront views and private terrace overlooking the Atlantic. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, high-end finishes, and access to world-class amenities including a resort-style pool and full fitness center. Prime Miami Beach location steps from dining and entertainment.
